title: Shelve Refabricated
description: Vanilla-esque additions. Now ported to Fabric.
body: # Shelve Refabricated This is the Fabric port of [Shelve](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sheve) by MattersSstream. It's almost the same as the original version, while some features are not implemented (e.g. Trash Can). In theory it's compatible with Quilt or 1.19 snapspots.
